name: sync
description: 项目配置同步插件，提供 MCP、LSP、Hooks、状态栏和 Claude Skills 同步功能

interface.shortDescription: Sync MCP/LSP/hooks/statusline/skills templates into a project
interface.longDescription: Bootstraps a project's Claude Code and Codex environment: configures MCP servers (context7/feishu/grafana), detects LSP, sets up SessionStart hooks, syncs GitLab MR templates, the Claude Skills library, the status line, and Codex plugins.
